title: oxalis latifolia subsp. galeottii
intro: Oxalis latifolia subsp. galeottii is a perennial plant species belonging to the Oxalidaceae family, also known as the wood sorrel family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The plant is believed to provide various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and treating wounds and skin conditions. Oxalis latifolia subsp. galeottii can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and topical creams to harness its medicinal properties.
